transcript.text:
I came to have a drink
after a long time!
(With flashy skills...)
(and delicious chicken anju*!) *food consumed with alcohol
(Welcome, this is 'Yakitori Zan Zan'!) The skewers are amazing
(Time for drinks)
(Drink drink drink!)
(Warming up with skewers)
(Another shot!!)
(Non-stop alcohol...)
You're drunk!!
(Am I...(?))
Your hair is in the jjamppong
(Buzzed) I feel sleepy
(Busy eating)
(A drinking alone mukbang with the best anju)

(It starts now!) Oh nice
Hello everyone
I'm here in Suwon
I came to have a drink
after a long time!
(Japanese restaurant with handmade dishes) It's a place called 'Yakitori Zan Zan'
They opened their 16th branch in Gwanggyo, Suwon
I heard that
(Suwon Station Branch / Siarosu-gil Branch / Na Hyeseok Main Branch) it's a popular place where people wait outside before it opens
They have a good location here....!
(The night view of Gwanggyo is perfect for healing) The night view is so nice
(Let's go) I'll head there now
(Located on the 1F of Gwanggyo, The Sharp Lake Park)
('Yakitori Zan Zan' Gwanggyo branch)
(Authentic Japanese grilled skewers)
(Scanning the menu!) There's a menu

There are many kinds of skewers here
There are 25 kinds, should I try them all?
Wow, shishamo! Should I have this later?
(Grilled shishamo, perfect as an anju!) I really like shishamo, I gotta eat this while drinking
This menu makes me excited...
There are so many dishes
(Make some noise if you're team anju...!!) The jjamppong looks good
(I'll order now!) Hello
For the skewers....
If they're 1P, can I get 2 of them?
And if they're 2P, I'll get 1 of them
so 50 in total
50...?
(It's not over yet) Yes, and
(But it's hard to just pick one...) So many of them look delicious
We actually have a new menu

- Two plus Korean beef yukhoe - Oh, two plus
Then, I'll get the two plus Korean beef yukhoe
and the spicy brisket jjamppong
(Done ordering) Thank you
Oh, right!
(Hurried back lol) I forgot to order the drinks
(Hurried back lol) Oh drinks? What can I get for you?
People drink a lot of this
Saero
(Today's alcoholic beverage is soju 'Saero' / Korean curved beauty) Saero, please
(The receipt for 1 person...)
(who came to 'Yakitori Zan Zan')
(25 kinds of skewers are being grilled without delay)
(Covered in the special sauce)
(It's not 50 yet...)
(Putting the skewers on top of the new grill)

('Yakitori Zan Zan' 50 skewers consisting of 25 kinds are complete!)
(Skewers are here) Please place them here, thank you
There's so much
Thank you
(If the skewers and the sauce are all here,) You can dip them in the sauce here
(shall we fire things up?)
(With a preheated wok and oil,)
(a showy fire show starts!)
(Briskets)
(are here)
(Spicy brisket jjamppong)
(Two plus Korean yukhoe)
(with raw egg, cheese, chives, and avocado)
Thank you haha
Thank you
Wow! Thank you

Amazing!
(Is she.. gonna eat it all...??)
(Everything is here!) The jjamppong is here and the skewers look amazing
Wow, it looks so good..!
As an appetizer,
(Button mushroom skewer!) they have button mushroom as a skewer
(Bon appétit!) I'll try it
Wow, even though it doesn't have the juice here,
inside the mushroom...
(Mushroom juice...?) Is it called juice?
It's very moist and delicious
Wow, it's so delicious..!
I was so curious about this
(Juice is dripping...) Look at it dripping
(Serious) It looks so delicious
Amazing!

They told me to dip it in here
(Mixing the sauce) I'll have a bite with this
I like this sauce
I'm so happy that I can try all the different kinds
I gotta have a drink!
(Looks like she knows how to drink soju..)
(A pretty soju glass full of soju...!) The soju glass is really pretty
(Let's drink!) You gotta have alcohol with skewers
Ahh
I feel like I'm gonna drink a lot
This is the mushroom pork belly!
Next is salted pollack chicken breast!
Wow, the sauce is delicious
(Finished it quickly)
(Time for a shot)
(The long-awaited two plus Korean beef yukhoe...!) The plating is pretty

There's egg and avocado too
(The portion is big) And there's a lot of yukhoe, the portion is big
Usually, they only give like half the amount, right?
I'm knocking all the hard work down
The color is so nice, looks delicious
Wow, I should order this to go
Hahaha
Your reaction is better than mine haha
Are you gonna eat this now? You're not, right?
I'll eat it later
It's gonna cool down... Can I eat it first?
What...?
(Yes, if you want...) Yes, go ahead...
(I'm just kidding, enjoy it) I'll order one more later so eat this
(Thank you lol)
The yukhoe is cut very thin

(What.. is this...?)
Mmmm soju soju!
(With seaweed this time!)
Next up is quail egg pork belly!
I think they place would be so good
to come with friends for drinking
('Robata Zan Zan' Guro Digital Branch / "Zan Zan" Siarosu-gil Branch) There's a branch in Seoul too
(Asking for a party member 1/10) I'll go there with my friends next time
It's so delicious
(So tasty!)
This is rice cake pork belly!
I'm surprised because I didn't expect this taste
It's not just soft rice cake, it's crispy on the outside
and it's soft on the inside
The shrimp is left
Isn't this black tiger shrimp? It's so big!

It's so moist, it peels so well
(Cleared 1 plate)
Next, what is this one?
(So juicy, who is this guy?) Can you see it dripping? It's so juicy
I think it's the beef chuck flap tail
I think I got it
Yes, it's the beef chuck flap tail
It is? Thank you haha
(Bragging KING) I have mukbang experience
With wasabi!
Whoa, this is it
You gotta eat it like this!!
(Got a mole on her cheek)
Wow, it's my first time eating chuck fail tail skewers
There are so many kinds of skewers
(Let's drink once more!!)

This is really nice
I can't really drink soju so I drink a lot of Chungha
There's less of that
alcohol flavor
that's unique to soju
And I heard this was zero calories
It's not zero calories
It's zero sugar!
There's no sugar in this
Whole shrimp!
(Shrimp pork belly) There pork belly wrapped around the shrimp
Delicious
(This has to be good!) There's no way that this can't taste bad
Oh, this is nice
Since I have to eat the jjamppong,
I should move the yukhoe over

(Moving the yukhoe..!)
Wow, the outside is very pretty
It's perfect to eat while looking at the night view!
(The beautiful night view of Gwanggyo and a glass of soju create good vibes..!)
(Spicy brisket jjamppong is here!) Wow, thank you
(It looks amazing...!) I'm so excited for this
I'll try the soup first!
Ah, it's so nice
I have to have a drink with this
It's necessary
(A spicy soup is a must with soju)
Ah, this is unbelievable
(A lot of noodles as well as a lot of beef brisket!) The brisket and the noodles
This is a place to drink
But
(The quality of anju is as good as what you get from a restaurant...!) the anju is just like a proper dish

(The alcohol I've been drinking is evaporating...!)
(Reaching for the soju again... lol)
(Enjoying it properly...)
(Another drink...?) Another glass of soju
(Spicy brisket jjamppong effect)
Oh, this is nice!
I actually can't
really drink well while eating
I usually can't drink at regular restaurants
(Thanks to 'Yakitori Zan Zan', I can drink...) It's definitely easier to drink here
(Did I miss anything?) Have I tried everything?
(Peekaboo) Oh! I haven't tried this yet
Chicken wing!
This has to be good!
(Tasting 25 types of skewers is done!) Have I tried all the different kinds?
Then, I'll eat the one that was really delicious

(Pollack roe chicken breast!)
(Speed up!)
(Pour pour pour)
(Cleared 1 bottle of Saero) Oh? I finished it
(I'm gonna get drunk today..!) Should I have another bottle?
We can get you shishamo if you want...
Then, can I get 5 of them please? Thank you
I said I wanted to try shishamo earlier
(Thank you for taking care of me...!) And they said they can make it for me
('Yakitori Zan Zan' is already crowded with customers...!)
(Tzuyang speeds up too)
You're fine?
You're not drunk?
(Showing off... lol) Who would get drunk off this?
I wouldn't get drunk off this
It's really delicious, not just because I'm trying it for the first time

It's really juicy
Personally,
(Today's best?!) the best skewer is
rice cake pork belly...!
You're drunk
(She's drunk... lol)
Who would get drunk with one bottle?!!
Your hair is in the jjamppong because you're drunk
(Why are you flustered...? LOL) I always do this, why are you saying it's because I'm drunk...
(Buzzed...) I kinda feel sleepy
(I have to rank them...) I can't rank them
In 1st place..
It's my personal taste
Of course, other things might taste much better
(Congrats, rice cake pork belly) I'll give rice cake pork belly 1st place
Wow, congrats!

Wow!! Thank you!
(Grilled shishamo is here!) Yes, here please
Usually, they serve 10 of them
but they gave me 5 just to taste
(Grilled shishamo)
They don't
just fry the fish on a frying pan
(They grill it directly over a rice straw fire!) They grill it over rice straw
They really put a lot of effort into cooking
(Asking for a party member 1/10) I'll try it next time
Bon appétit
Oh, the flavor is really nice
It's not regular shishamo
It's been grilled on rice straw so the flavor is completely different
It's so good!
It's full of roe

(Full of roe..!!)
Do you wanna try one?
(I've waited for you to say that...)
(It's nice to see them share)
Isn't the rice straw flavor good?
100 of them is possible!!
100 of them???
I can do that too
(Pineapple pork belly)
(Not everyone likes cooked pineapple) There are a lot of people who don't like cooked pineapples
It's so delicious
PD, do you dislike it?
I don't really like it
Why don't you like it?
I don't like warm fruit!!
(He certainly dislikes it... Haha)

(Burst out laughing lol)
Why do you dislike it?
(Finally, only 1 skewer is left)
(I can see the end!!) I'm finally almost there
(Last spurt)
(Every last drop)
(Cleared the spicy brisket jjamppong)
I have one shot left. I'll have it with the shishamo!
It's so delicious
The end!
('Yakitori Zan Zan' CLEAR!)
All the anju
were delicious
And they went well with the soju
(Want to enjoy it again with her loved ones...) I want to come here with my friends next time to try other stuff as well
I had a great meal today!
